subcodes.first_line: O Hearing Ear of creation! Hearken unto the Call of the Lord, the All-Merciful, which ascendeth from the realm of sorrows, that perchance thou mayest hear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمع اکوان بشنو ندای رب رحمن را که از شطر احزان مرتفع است که شاید بشنیدن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech
